question: The concept of 'supply chain management'
options: Cost advantages from producing a variety of products together
Identifies the longest sequence of dependent tasks to determine minimum project time
Coordinating the flow of goods, information and money from supplier to customer
Greater control over supply chain, quality and costs

question: 'Just-in-time' (JIT) production
options: Coordinating the flow of goods, information and money from supplier to customer
Cost advantages from producing a variety of products together
QC checks finished products; QA monitors the entire production process
Receives materials exactly when needed, reducing inventory costs

Cost advantages from producing a variety of products together

The percentage of total productive capacity currently being used
